mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (title, description, cover_url, location, start_time, end_time, sign_start_time, sign_end_time, total_quota, status, creator_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{coverUrl}, #{location}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{signStartTime}, #{signEndTime}, #{totalQuota}, #{status}, #{creatorId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS creator_name FROM activity a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = a.creator_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, location = #{location}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, sign_start_time = #{signStartTime}, sign_end_time = #{signEndTime}, total_quota = #{totalQuota}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE activity SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE activity SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE activity SET signed_count = signed_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
